languages.title: Ulimi
languages.subtitle: Khetha ulimi olusetshenziswe kulo lonke uhlelo lokusebenza.

phone.label: Inombolo yocingo
phone.searchCountry: Cinga izwe, ikhodi, noma isiqalo sokudayela
phone.invalid: Faka inombolo yocingo evumenisekisiwe yezwe elikhethiwe.

auth.onboardingTagline: Umlingani wezokuphepha womuntu ngezikhathi eziphakathi kokuthi "Ngilungile" futhi "Ngidinga usizo."
auth.createSubtitle: Khetha indlela yokungena ngemvume ukuvikela igrafu yakho yokuphepha.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukuqedela ukungena ngemvume. Hlola uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Sebenzisa iseshini yokuthuthukiswa kwendawo. I-Native Google Sign-In isebenza ekwakhiweni kwentuthuko.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Bhangqa manje noma uqhubeke bese wengeza kamuva.
auth.northStarBody: I-VL01 egqokekayo ingabangela ukugeleza kokuphepha ngompompi kanye nokucindezela okude.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Umlingani wakho wezokuphepha omnene ebalazweni nasezingcinini.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear kungasiza ngemodi yasekhaya, imodi ye-guardian, imodi ephuthumayo, izingcingo zokuxolisa, nokusekelwa kwezwi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Isetshenziselwe imephu, izindawo eziyingozi, ukufika okuphephile, kanye SOS mongo.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving ucela indawo ukuze abaqaphi baqonde ukuthi usizo lungadingeka kuphi. Ungakushintsha lokhu kamuva kuzilungiselelo.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Izaziso zisekela ukungena kanye nemicimbi ephuthumayo.
permissions.notificationsBody: Sisebenzisa kuphela izaziso zokuphepha, izibuyekezo eziphuthumayo, nezikhumbuzi ozivumelayo.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isebenzisa indawo yakho ngemephu yokuphepha, izindawo eziyingozi, ukwabelana okusheshayo, nomongo SOS. Ungakushintsha lokhu kamuva kuzilungiselelo.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ithumela izikhumbuzo zokungena, izibuyekezo eziphuthumayo, kanye neziphakamiso zokuphepha ozivumelayo. Asisebenzisi izaziso zezikhangiso.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving usebenzisa imakrofoni yakho kuphela uma uqala umlingani AI noma ucingo lokuphepha.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isebenzisa Bluetooth ukubhangqa nobucwebe NorthStar, ukufunda isimo sokuxhumana, futhi kubangele ukugeleza kokuphepha kusuka ku-wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving usebenzisa ikhamera kuphela uma ukhetha ukuthatha isithombe sephrofayili noma ukwabelana ngesithombe sokuphepha.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving igcina lokhu kugeleza kutholakala kuzilungiselelo nakudeshibhodi.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Khetha izwi elihambisana nalo elizizwa liphephile kakhulu ukulizwa.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Amapayipi amahlanu angakhuphukela ku-SOS ne-guardian alerts.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Thola isizathu esizwakalayo sokushiya isimo esingakhululekile.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Qala ucingo lomlingani wesikhathi sangempela lapho udinga ukwesekwa.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Zama ukugeleza kokuphepha ku-demo ephansi yengcindezi.

jewelry.noDevices: Azikho izisetshenziswa NorthStar eziseduze ezitholakele okwamanje.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth ukuskena akukwazanga ukuqala. Sicela uzame futhi.
jewelry.scanFailed: Asikwazanga ukuthola ubucwebe obuseduze. Hlola Bluetooth, gcina NorthStar eduze, bese uzama futhi.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth ukuskena akukwazanga ukuqala. Hlola ukufinyelela Bluetooth bese uzama futhi.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Ukufinyelela kwesisetshenziswa esiseduze kuvaliwe. Vumela ukufinyelela Bluetooth kuzilungiselelo, bese uzama futhi.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar kuthathe isikhathi eside kakhulu ukuxhumana. Yisondeze eduze bese uzama futhi.
jewelry.connectFailed: Asikwazanga ukuxhuma NorthStar. Hlola ukuthi ikhokhisiwe futhi iseduze, bese uzama futhi.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Gcina NorthStar ushaje futhi usondele kule foni, bese uhlola futhi.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Hlola ezinye izinketho ezise- NorthStar namaphethelo

home.subtitle: Ideshibhodi yomlingani wokuphepha
home.readyBody: Izwi, imephu, ubucwebe, kanye nabaqaphi kude nompompi owodwa.

map.title: Imephu yokuphepha
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go ukubuka kuqala; Mapbox inikeza ukwakhiwa kwesakhiwo.
map.updateFailed: Asikwazanga ukubuyekeza indawo yakho. Sicela uzame futhi.
map.notRequested: Ukufinyelela kwendawo akucelwanga. Ungayivumela kamuva kusuka kuzilungiselelo.
map.permissionOff: Ukufinyelela kwendawo kuvaliwe. Vumela ku-Izimiso ukugxila kumephu yokuphepha kuwe.
map.timeout: Indawo yakho ithatha isikhathi eside kunalokho obekulindelekile. Hambisa endaweni ethile ngesibonakaliso esicacile bese uzama futhi.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Izindawo ezithembekile ozilondolozayo zizovela lapha ukuze zifinyeleleke ngokushesha.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Qala ucingo noma uthayiphe umlayezo uma usulungile.

history.clearMessage: Lokhu kususa imiyalezo elondoloziwe AI ehambisana nayo kulesi sisetshenziswa.
history.title: Umlando wengxoxo
history.subtitle: AI imiyalezo ehambisana nayo elondoloziwe kulesi sisetshenziswa.
history.emptyMessage: Izingxoxo zakho AI zizovela lapha ngemuva kocingo lwakho lokuqala.
history.loadFailed: Asikwazanga ukufaka umlando wengxoxo. Sicela uzame futhi.
history.clearFailed: Asikwazanga ukucacisa umlando wengxoxo. Sicela uzame futhi.
history.deleteFailed: Asikwazanga ukususa leyo ngxoxo. Sicela uzame futhi.

voices.title: Amazwi ami okuphepha
voices.subtitle: Khetha izwi elizwakala lilungile ukulizwa.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Le sampula yezwi ayikwazanga ukudlalwa. Sicela uzame futhi.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Sebenzisa izimpendulo ezihambisana nazo ezihlanganisiwe uma izifakazelo zomphambo noma Hume zingatholakali.
settings.privacyBody: Thumela noma ususe imininingwane yendawo egcinwe kulesi sisetshenziswa.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Lokhu kususa imininingwane yakho, izimiso, abathintwa abaphuthumayo, umlando wengxoxo, izikhumbuzo zemvume, kanye nesiwombe semvume yendawo kulesi sisetshenziswa.
settings.updateFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukulondoloza lokho kukhetha. Sicela uzame futhi.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Isiwombe sakho sisasebenza. Sicela uzame futhi.

contacts.title: Oxhumana nabo abaphuthumayo
contacts.subtitle: Abantu abathembekile bayatholakala ngesikhathi sokugeleza kwezokuphepha.
contacts.name: Igama
contacts.empty: Akukho oxhumana nabo abaphuthumayo abangeziwe okwamanje.
contacts.emptyTitle: Akukabi khona oxhumana nabo abaphuthumayo okwamanje
contacts.emptyMessage: Engeza umuntu omethembayo ukuze alungele lapho ukugeleza kokuphepha kubadinga.
contacts.removeMessage: Lo muntu ngeke esabonakala ekugelezeni kwakho okuphuthumayo.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukulondoloza lo thintwayo. Hlola imininingwane bese uzama futhi.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukususa lo mxhumanisi. Sicela uzame futhi.

friends.title: Abangane
friends.subtitle: Abaqaphi, izicelo, kanye negrafu ephuthumayo.
friends.emptyMessage: Abangane abathembekile nabaqaphi bazovela lapha uma bengezwa.

emergency.title: Isimo esiphuthumayo SOS
emergency.subtitle: Khuphuka kuphela uma udinga usizo olusheshayo.
emergency.body: Lokhu kuzokwazisa ukugeleza kwakho kokuphepha futhi kulungiselele oxhumana nabo abaphuthumayo.
emergency.quickShareMessage: I-stub yokwabelana ngendawo ilungile. Xhuma iphuzu lokuphela lokwabelana nge-backend ukuthumela izixhumanisi ezibukhoma.

capybearTap.title: Capybear thepha
capybearTap.subtitle: Chofoza kabili NorthStar yakho ukuze uphonse i-orange yokuphepha.
capybearTap.body: Umzila we-Gesture ulungele i-wiring yomcimbi we-BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Ubonakala ungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi. Umlayezo wakho uzothunyelwa uma uxhuma kabusha.
errors.voiceQueued: Umlayezo ulondoloziwe. Izothunyelwa lapho umlingani wezwi ephinda axhumane.
errors.microphone: Ukufinyelela kwemakrofoni kuyadingeka kumakholi ezwi. Ungayivumela kuzilungiselelo, noma uthayiphe umyalezo esikhundleni salokho.
errors.billing: Umlingani wezwi oluku-inthanethi akatholakali okwesikhashana. Ungaqhubeka nomlingani ongaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi.
errors.authentication: Umlingani wezwi akakwazanga ukuqinisekisa lesi siwombe. Ngena ngemvume futhi noma usebenzise umlingani ongaxhunyanisiwe okwamanje.
errors.timeout: Umlingani wezwi wathatha isikhathi eside kakhulu ukuphendula. Hlola uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi.
errors.network: Asikwazanga ukufinyelela kumlingani wezwi. Hlola uxhumano lwakho, bese uzama futhi noma uqhubeke ungaxhunyiwe.
errors.genericVoice: Okuthile kwaphazamisa ucingo lwezwi. Zama futhi, noma uqhubeke nomlingani ongaxhunyanisiwe.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving idinga ukufinyelela kumakrofoni ukuze kuphephe futhi AI izingcingo ezihambisana nazo.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving usebenzisa indawo yakho kumephu yokuphepha nezici zokuphepha eziseduze.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving isebenzisa Bluetooth ukuxhuma ubucwebe bakho NorthStar ukuphepha.
